name: coTfsLssSetMasterResponseIdentifyRemoteSlaveMask
title: coTfsLssSetMasterResponseIdentifyRemoteSlaveMask
syntax: long coTfsLssSetMasterResponseIdentifyRemoteSlaveMask( dword vendorIdMask, dword productCodeMask, dword revisionNoLowMask, dword revisionNoHighMask, dword serialNoLowMask, dword serialNoHighMask );
description: This function sets the masks for the parameters of function coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyRemoteSlave and has to be called before that function.

parameters.name: vendorIdMask
parameters.description: Mask for vendor-ID parameter; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

parameters.name: productCodeMask
parameters.description: Mask for product code parameter; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

parameters.name: revisionNoLowMask
parameters.description: Mask for low boundary of revision number parameter; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

parameters.name: revisionNoHighMask
parameters.description: Mask for high boundary of revision number parameter; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

parameters.name: serialNoLowMask
parameters.description: Mask for low boundary of serial number parameter; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

parameters.name: serialNoHighMask
parameters.description: Mask for high boundary of serial number parameter; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
